name: Better Whey Protein Powder
description_html:
Better for you and better for the planet too!

Fuel up with the delicious high-quality nutrition of whey protein – now made from fermentation, so it’s lactose-free and easier to digest**, while using less water***(1), less GHG emissions***(1), and less energy consumption***(2) than traditional whey protein.

  • 21g* sustainable protein
  • Lactose-free & easier to digest**
  • Complete with all 9 essential amino acids, 5g BCAAs*, and 1.5x Leucine*^ as traditional whey to support your active lifestyle and muscle health.
  • Deliciously creamy taste experience.

More Information

* Per serving
** Compared to traditional whey protein. The traditional whey protein from cows digestibility number is 0.95. Whey protein isolate from fermentation’s digestibility number is 0.96. The higher value of protein digestibility value indicates the easier to be digested.
^ Compared to 100% whey protein powder from USDA nutrient database. 13g of leucine in Orgain Better Whey fermented whey isolate vs. 8.6g of leucine in traditional whey protein from cows per 100g basis.
+ Not a low calorie food

*** Comparing Orgain Better Whey (Fermented Whey Isolate) to traditional whey protein production from cows

(1) Calculated with the same total corrected protein content at 1kg (3.5% w/w protein) by the blue water consumption. GHG (Green House Gas) Emissions are measured in carbon dioxide-equivalents (kg-CO2e) in average number per 1kg of protein. This is measured in kilograms of CO2-equivalents per 1kg of protein (kgCO2 eq per 1kg protein)

(2) The low heating value approach was used to determine the primary energy from non-renewable resources and is measured in megajoules (MJ)

 

Blue Water: Based on blue water which refers to a consumption of water use captured the amount of water consumed by the system, not just total withdrawals. This is measured by Liters (L) – total amount of water withdrawn from and not returned to surface and ground water sources.  The two major sources of water consumption for both Fermented whey and Bovine whey: Fermented Whey (Protein Development at 50.1%, and Cleaning at 14%), and Bovine Whey (Drinking and Cleaning – using 40 gal per day, range 30-50 gal per day The Value of Water (psu.edu)). https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC5149046/ , 19. Hoffman JR, Falvo MJ. Protein-Which is best. J. Sports Sci. Med. .2004;3:118–30

Green House Gas Emissions: Emissions are measured in carbon dioxide-equivalents (kg CO2e) in average number per 1,000 grams of protein. This is measured in kilograms of CO2-equivalents per 1000g of protein (kgCO2eq per 1000g protein). Source: Poore, J., & Nemecek, T. (2018). Reducing food’s environmental impacts through producers and consumers. Science, 360(6392), 987-992.

Energy Consumption: The low heating value approach was used to determine the primary energy from non-renewable resources and is measured in megajoules (MJ). Source: Energies 2020, 13, 1288; doi:10.3390/en13051288.

Calculated based on total protein in bovine milk at 3.5% by weight.

description_html:
Level up your wellness game with Orgain Creatine Lean Muscle, a powerhouse that delivers 3-in-1 support for your muscles, mind+, and metabolism‡, whether you're hitting PRs at the gym, keeping up with your running crew, or simply conquering your jam-packed days†.

Plus, it supports your brain health+ – which uses about 20% of your body's energy daily, while chromium picolinate supports your metabolism‡ and healthy carbohydrate utilization†. 

No more chalky, gritty supplements that ruin your morning smoothie. Our blend of micronized creatine and chromium dissolves easily into whatever you're sipping – coffee, juice, smoothies, you name it. And since it's unflavored, it won't mess with your favorite flavors.

We focus on delivering what matters – 5g** of creatine for lean muscle and brain health support+† and 200mcg** of chromium for metabolism support‡† – while avoiding additives, fillers, and preservatives. Plus, it’s vegan, gluten-free, and made with no soy or genetically engineered (GE)  ingredients – making it a great addition for your wellness stack.

From the brand behind the #1 plant protein powder in the US◇, Orgain Creatine Lean Muscle is an ideal partner for making the most of your wellness era†. Because when you feel strong, you can take on anything. 

 

^when used in conjunction with a regular exercise and weight training routine. 

† These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

* Studies show that a five-day loading protocol involving higher dosages (e.g. 20g) accelerates the saturation of creatine in muscle cells and supports  muscle recovery. Consult a health care professional for recommended dosages.

+Studies show that creatine may support brain health in vegetarians and aging individuals

name: Creatine Monohydrate Powder
description_html:
Creatine can do so much more than you might think. Orgain Creatine Monohydrate supports your muscles and your brain health.*‡


There’s a reason why creatine has always been associated with musclebound body builders. It maintains intracellular levels of ATP (a molecule that stores and provides energy for cells) that helps improve muscle size, strength, power^*, and recovery from strength training or high intensity activity.*† It also supports your brain - an organ that uses about 20% of your body's energy. 

Each serving delivers 5g of micronized creatine monohydrate that can dissolve more easily than the typical particle-size of creatine**. It offers a smooth taste experience and can be easily mixed into water, juice, smoothies, and more.

In keeping with Orgain’s commitment to higher standards by thoughtfully selecting each ingredient used in its products, Orgain Creatine Monohydrate provides just creatine, and nothing else - no additives, fillers, or preservatives. It’s vegan, gluten free and non-GMO and it includes no soy ingredients or added sugar.

So do the smart thing and the strong thing at the same time—support your muscles AND mind with Orgain Creatine Monohydrate.*‡

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.**Comparing Orgain® micronized creatine to typical regular-sized creatine
^ when used in conjunction with a regular exercise and weight training routine. †Studies show that a five-day loading protocol involving higher dosages (e.g. 20g) accelerates the saturation of creatine in muscle cells and supports muscle recovery. name: Wonder Gut Powder - Orange Mango
description_html:
Your microbiome has a big job. From supporting your immune system to keeping digestion on track, your gut does a lot. That’s why Orgain created Wonder Gut, a daily 5-in-1 mix that brings together hand-picked ingredients for maximum microbiome support** delivered in a refreshing Orange Mango flavor.

Each scoop includes 5g of fiber to help with digestion* to keep you full, 1 billion probiotics for gut health, 50 organic superfoods, 25 organic greens, and adaptogenic herbs like Ashwagandha, Reishi, and Lion’s Mane. That’s five categories of wonderful ingredients to help you maintain a healthy gut**.  

Wonder Gut is also an excellent source of vitamin C, which is all sorts of good news for your immunity. Made with the highest standards, this digestive mix is Certified Organic, non-GMO, Certified Plant-Based, gluten free, and contains no soy or artificial flavors or sweeteners. Doctors often say that the microbiome is the second brain of the body—so, it’s time for a little brain food for your gut. Great for men and women alike. Just scoop, stir or mix this soluble powder, and give your gut the high five it deserves with a wonderful 5-in-1 mix. Go ahead and go guts with it. 

*per serving
**These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.
